name: D/D/D Headhunt
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヘッドハント
desc: If you control a "D/D/D" monster: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; take control of it until the End Phase of the next turn, but its effects are negated, it cannot declare an attack, also if it is a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck, it is also treated as a "D/D/D" monster. You can only activate 1 "D/D/D Headhunt" per turn.
eff: If you control a "D/D/D" monster: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; take control of it until the End Phase of the next turn, but its effects are negated, it cannot declare an attack, also if it is a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck, it is also treated as a "D/D/D" monster. You can only activate 1 "D/D/D Headhunt" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
mst: Negates the effects of your Effect Monsters
